issue_body:
No observability on providers. Add in-memory metrics: total requests, per-model breakdown, p50/p95/p99 latency, error rate. Expose via `GET /metrics` (JSON). Rolling window, no external deps.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `GET /metrics` with all listed metrics
- Latency percentiles from last 1000 requests
- Per-model breakdown
- In-memory only, resets on restart
- Tests: metrics update, percentile calc, per-model isolation

**Effort:** 3-4h | **Points:** RBOB Genesis Bonus (5x)

fisiere_relevante.motiv: numele fisierului se potriveste cu issue: provider.test.ts
